channel.title: Mozilla Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Mozilla Corporation (mozilla).

item.title: CVE-2026-16361 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox ESR 115.38 and Firefox ESR 140.13
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 115.37 and Firefox ESR 140.12. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability…

item.title: CVE-2026-16360 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox ESR 115.38, Firefox ESR 140.13 and Firefox 153
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 115.37, Firefox ESR 140.12 and Firefox 152. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This v…

item.title: CVE-2026-16412 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox ESR 140.13 and Firefox 153
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 140.12 and Firefox 152. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fix…

item.title: CVE-2026-16411 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox 153
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 152. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16408 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Integer overflow in the Audio/Video: Playback component
item.description: Integer overflow in the Audio/Video: Playback component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16406 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Mitigation bypass in the Networking component
item.description: Mitigation bypass in the Networking component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16405 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Information disclosure in the Networking: WebSockets component
item.description: Information disclosure in the Networking: WebSockets component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153 and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16397 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Clickjacking issue in the WebExtensions component in Firefox for Android
item.description: Clickjacking issue in the WebExtensions component in Firefox for Android. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16395 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Integer overflow in the Audio/Video component
item.description: Integer overflow in the Audio/Video component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16394 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component
item.description: Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16359 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Audio/Video: GMP component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Audio/Video: GMP component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16375 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Site isolation issue in the Networking: HTTP component
item.description: Site isolation issue in the Networking: HTTP component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153 and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16374 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Information disclosure in the Framework component in DevTools
item.description: Information disclosure in the Framework component in DevTools. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153 and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16373 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Information disclosure in the Privacy component in Firefox for Android
item.description: Information disclosure in the Privacy component in Firefox for Android. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16372 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Privilege escalation in the DOM: Content Processes component
item.description: Privilege escalation in the DOM: Content Processes component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16371 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Privilege escalation in the DOM: Navigation component
item.description: Privilege escalation in the DOM: Navigation component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153 and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16357 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16356 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sandbox escape due to use-after-free in the Disability Access APIs component
item.description: Sandbox escape due to use-after-free in the Disability Access APIs component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16355 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component
item.description: JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16368 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153 and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16367 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sandbox escape due to invalid pointer in the Disability Access APIs component
item.description: Sandbox escape due to invalid pointer in the Disability Access APIs component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16354 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Information disclosure in the Graphics: ImageLib component
item.description: Information disclosure in the Graphics: ImageLib component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16353 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Invalid pointer in the DOM: Bindings (WebIDL) component
item.description: Invalid pointer in the DOM: Bindings (WebIDL) component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16366 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Privilege escalation in the DOM: Navigation component
item.description: Privilege escalation in the DOM: Navigation component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16365 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Privilege escalation in the DOM: Workers component
item.description: Privilege escalation in the DOM: Workers component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16364 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Audio/Video: Playback component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Audio/Video: Playback component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153.

item.title: CVE-2026-16363 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component
item.description: JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153 and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16352 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sandbox escape due to use-after-free in the Disability Access APIs component
item.description: Sandbox escape due to use-after-free in the Disability Access APIs component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16351 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sandbox escape due to use-after-free in the DOM: Navigation component
item.description: Sandbox escape due to use-after-free in the DOM: Navigation component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16350 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Audio/Video: cubeb component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Audio/Video: cubeb component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-16349 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Same-origin policy bypass in the DOM: Navigation component
item.description: Same-origin policy bypass in the DOM: Navigation component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-15719 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Site isolation in the DOM: Navigation component
item.description: We are aware that exploit code for this is public however we are not aware of any attacks in the wild abusing this flaw. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152.0.6.

item.title: CVE-2026-15718 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Invalid pointer in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component
item.description: We are aware that exploit code for this is public however we are not aware of any attacks in the wild abusing this flaw. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152.0.6.

item.title: CVE-2026-14906 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Malicious webpage titles could allow overwriting of bundled PDF resources when saving webpages as PDFs in Firefox for iOS
item.description: Pages with malicious titles could potentially allow saved PDF content to overwrite PDF files or bundled content within the Firefox for iOS application sandbox. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox for iOS 152.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-13356 — Interrupted navigation could allow address bar origin spoofing in Firefox for iOS
item.description: A malicious webpage could interrupt a pending navigation by enqueuing a synchronous JavaScript dialog, causing the browser UI to display the destination origin in the address bar while continuing to render attacker-controlled content. This vulnerabil…

item.title: CVE-2026-57963 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Chat UI manipulation by injection
item.description: An attacker who can send HTML chat messages (via Matrix or XMPP) can inject arbitrary styled content, phishing links, and CSS that manipulates the chat UI. This vulnerability was fixed in Thunderbird 152.0.1 and Thunderbird 140.12.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-57962 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Denial-of-service via malicious LDAP address-book server
item.description: A malicious LDAP server, which a Thunderbird user is configured to query for address-book autocomplete, can stash arbitrarily large amounts of attacker-supplied data into the Thunderbird LDAP client until it crashes due to memory exhaustion. This vul…

item.title: CVE-2026-14241 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox 152.0.4
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 152.0.3. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152.0…

item.title: CVE-2026-53899 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Cross-origin cookies could be leaked when opening a PDF link
item.description: Firefox for iOS used partial domain matching when attaching cookies to PDF requests, allowing a malicious site on a suffix domain to receive cookies belonging to the target site. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox for iOS 152.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-12330 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Internationalization component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Internationalization component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox ESR 140.12, Firefox ESR 115.37, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-12329 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bug fixed in Thunderbird ESR 140.12
item.description: Memory safety bug fixed in Thunderbird ESR 140.12. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox ESR 140.12 and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-12328 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox ESR 115.37, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird ESR 140.12, Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 115.36, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird ESR 140.11, Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have bee…

item.title: CVE-2026-12327 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird ESR 140.12, Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird ESR 140.11, Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run a…

item.title: CVE-2026-12326 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed…

item.title: CVE-2026-12325 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Denial-of-service in the Graphics: ImageLib component
item.description: Denial-of-service in the Graphics: ImageLib component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Firefox ESR 115.37, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-12324 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: CanvasWebGL component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: CanvasWebGL component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152, Firefox ESR 140.12, Thunderbird 152, and Thunderbird 140.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-12323 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Spoofing issue in the DOM: Core & HTML component
item.description: Spoofing issue in the DOM: Core & HTML component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.title: CVE-2026-12322 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Clickjacking issue in the Widget: Gtk component
item.description: Clickjacking issue in the Widget: Gtk component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.title: CVE-2026-12321 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component
item.description: JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.

item.title: CVE-2026-12320 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Information disclosure in the Password Manager component
item.description: Information disclosure in the Password Manager component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 152 and Thunderbird 152.
